sources.evidence_type: vendor-authored Reddit announcement and advisory performance claim
sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Claims approximately 1.5x speed versus QAT and cites B200 results; not a local RTX 5090 or RTX PRO 6000 measurement.
sources.decision_impact: Triggered the local same-engine QAT-versus-NVFP4 A/B; the 1.5x claim was not reproduced by the controlled 12B run.

sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Lists the Gemma 4 12B, 26B-A4B, and 31B compressed-tensors NVFP4 repositories tested locally.

sources.evidence_type: publisher model card and immutable repository
sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Revision b1f649734b34aa5575b03d186abd1b9be3d0d5c4; 8.67 GiB weights; vLLM 0.25+ native NVFP4 recipe.
sources.decision_impact: Direct RTX 5090 A/B against the current official 12B W4A16 checkpoint.

sources.evidence_type: publisher model card and immutable repository
sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Revision 20df0542b1a86ce19f495ac2eca2c7c12bce82f9; 15.75 GiB weights; tested on both local Blackwell GPUs.
sources.decision_impact: Established the fastest locally tested Gemma 4 variation, but it did not clear the strict repeated quality gate.

sources.evidence_type: publisher model card and immutable repository
sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Revision 373c00b5ecb0a8ee43942b5ca08b93805de8eee4; 23.06 GiB weights; full 256K Heavy serve.
sources.decision_impact: Passed the strict Heavy quality gate but was materially slower than both 26B-A4B and the current 12B Heavy serve.
